label: Pawn relation
description: Defines a social relationship between two pawns (e.g. Spouse, Parent, Sibling). Referenced by FactionDef.royalTitleInheritanceRelations to specify which family relations can inherit royal titles.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# class that implements the generation and logic for this relation. Must be a subclass of PawnRelationWorker.

labelFemale.label: Label (female)
labelFemale.description: Gender-specific label used when the pawn with this relation is female.

importance.label: Importance
importance.description: Numeric weight controlling how significant this relation is relative to others.

implied.label: Implied
implied.description: If true, this relation is automatically generated from other relations rather than stored explicitly. Cannot be true at the same time as reflexive.

reflexive.label: Reflexive
reflexive.description: If true, creating this relation from A to B also creates it from B to A. Cannot be true at the same time as implied.

opinionOffset.label: Opinion offset
opinionOffset.description: Flat bonus or penalty to opinion between the two pawns in this relation.

generationChanceFactor.label: Generation chance factor
generationChanceFactor.description: Multiplier on the chance that this relation is generated during pawn generation.

romanceChanceFactor.label: Romance chance factor
romanceChanceFactor.description: Multiplier on the chance that romance attempts occur between pawns with this relation.

incestOpinionOffset.label: Incest opinion offset
incestOpinionOffset.description: Opinion modifier applied when a pawn in this relation is involved in an incestuous romance.

familyByBloodRelation.label: Family by blood
familyByBloodRelation.description: If true, this is a blood family relation (parent, child, sibling, etc.) rather than a chosen relation.

removeOnDeath.label: Remove on death
removeOnDeath.description: If true, this relation is removed from the surviving pawn when the other pawn dies.

removeOnLeftBehind.label: Remove on left behind
removeOnLeftBehind.description: If true, this relation is removed when one pawn leaves the colony map and is not recoverable.

inbredChanceOnChild.label: Inbred chance on child
inbredChanceOnChild.description: Chance that a child born from parents with this relation to each other has the Inbred trait.

diedThought.label: Died thought
diedThought.description: Thought given when the pawn with this relation dies.

diedThoughtFemale.label: Died thought (female)
diedThoughtFemale.description: Gender-specific died thought used when the pawn with this relation is female.

lostThought.label: Lost thought
lostThought.description: Thought given when the pawn with this relation goes missing or is lost.

lostThoughtFemale.label: Lost thought (female)
lostThoughtFemale.description: Gender-specific lost thought used when the pawn with this relation is female.

soldThoughts.label: Sold thoughts
soldThoughts.description: Thoughts given when the pawn with this relation is sold into slavery.

killedThought.label: Killed thought
killedThought.description: Thought given when the pawn with this relation is killed by someone.

killedThoughtFemale.label: Killed thought (female)
killedThoughtFemale.description: Gender-specific killed thought used when the pawn with this relation is female.
